vocabulary.example: The test log records the condition associated with conformity assessment review.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試日誌記錄了與符合性評鑑審查相關的條件。

vocabulary.example: We confirmed certification body review before releasing the measurement result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 我們在發布量測結果前確認了驗證機構審查。

vocabulary.example: The laboratory evaluates test laboratory review under documented environmental conditions.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 實驗室在有紀錄的環境條件下評估測試實驗室審查。

vocabulary.example: The report links type approval review to the applicable requirement and result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 報告將型式認可審查連結到適用要求與結果。

vocabulary.example: The engineer compared technical construction file review with the approved baseline.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師將技術建構文件審查與核准基準進行比較。

vocabulary.example: The final review found that declaration of conformity review was consistently documented.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 最終審查確認符合性聲明審查已有一致的文件紀錄。

vocabulary.example: The technical record includes objective evidence for applicable standard review.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術紀錄包含適用標準審查的客觀證據。

vocabulary.example: The customer requested a clear explanation of product family review.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 客戶要求清楚說明產品系列審查。

vocabulary.example: The procedure defines the acceptance criterion for model difference review.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 程序定義了型號差異審查的接受準則。

vocabulary.example: The test plan identifies how certificate holder review will be controlled and recorded.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試計畫說明如何控制並記錄證書持有人審查。

common_sentences.english: The team will repeat model difference review under the worst-case condition.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 團隊會在最嚴苛條件下重新執行型號差異審查。

common_sentences.english: The report clearly identifies the method used for certificate holder review.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 報告已清楚標示證書持有人審查所使用的方法。

common_sentences.english: Please include the uncertainty related to conformity assessment review.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 請納入與符合性評鑑審查相關的不確定度。

common_sentences.english: Please verify certification body review before we start the test.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 開始測試前，請確認驗證機構審查。

common_sentences.english: We need traceable evidence for test laboratory review.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們需要可追溯的測試實驗室審查證據。

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified conformity assessment review and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認符合性評鑑審查並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for certification body review?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對驗證機構審查的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: Antenna gain mismatch — Certification investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 天線增益不一致：產品驗證調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 058 shows a repeatable antenna gain mismatch condition.
debug_case.background: The Certification configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: The production antenna differs from the approved sample.
Cable loss was omitted from the gain calculation.
check_steps: Confirm antenna part number and revision.
Recalculate gain using calibrated path loss.
corrective_actions: Update the technical file when an authorized change applies.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the Certification design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Why should we hire you for this engineering role? Connect your answer to Certification.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 連結職務需求、你的證據與能創造的價值。 並連結到「產品驗證」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I combine laboratory discipline, practical debugging, and clear English communication. That helps teams reach compliant designs faster and make decisions from reliable evidence. In Certification, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「conformity assessment review」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: conformity assessment review 指的是「符合性評鑑審查」。

quiz.prompt: 「驗證機構審查」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 certification body review。

quiz.prompt: The laboratory evaluates ________ under documented environmental conditions.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 實驗室在有紀錄的環境條件下評估測試實驗室審查。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 test laboratory review。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 type approval review（型式認可審查）。

quiz.prompt: Why should we hire you for this engineering role? Connect your answer to Certification.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 連結職務需求、你的證據與能創造的價值。 並連結到「產品驗證」。
quiz.answer: I combine laboratory discipline, practical debugging, and clear English communication. That helps teams reach compliant designs faster and make decisions from reliable evidence. In Certification, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
